_import_note: Import widgets first. Then fill widget_id values in assignments[] with the real UUIDs from the admin widget list. Leave assignments empty to import the layout structure without widget bindings.

data.name: Services Page (Hero + Stats + Team + Newsletter)
data.description: Full company/agency services page: header, hero banner, social-proof stats bar, team cards grid, newsletter signup, and footer.

assignments._note: Replace widget_id with real UUID of 'header-nav' widget
Replace widget_id with real UUID of 'hero-home1' widget (or your own hero)
Replace widget_id with real UUID of 'stats-bar' widget (import widget-stats-bar.json first)
Replace widget_id with real UUID of 'team-cards' widget (import widget-team-cards.json first)
Replace widget_id with real UUID of 'newsletter-signup' widget (import widget-newsletter-signup.json first)
Replace widget_id with real UUID of 'footer-nav' widget
